game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
He had one rule: No killing women or children. When a hitman is double-crossed by his employer, he brings forth a night of carnage and bloodshed. He had one rule: No killing women or children. When a hitman is double-crossed by his employer, he brings forth a night of carnage and bloodshed.
RED HOT VENGEANCE is a twin-stick shooter with a dark and violent storyline.

Main features:
  • 10 level campaign with varying objectives
  • 30 challenge levels
  • New Game+
  • A variety of weapons to customize your loadout
  • Level editor with Steam Workshop support.
  • It's free :)

In the aftermath of blood, smoke, and fire, a mob hitman is reborn as the spirit of pure bloodlust fueled vengeance. There is no time for mercy as you shoot your way through 10 levels of darkness and depravity. Each chapter is connected to the last through hand-drawn, fully voice-acted cutscenes. As you play through the campaign, you will unlock a variety of weapons each with their own behavior to fit your playstyle. Earn medals for completing challenges, find secrets, and wreak vengeance.


RED HOT VENGEANCE features 30 challenge missions. Each challenge is designed to offer a different experience from the campaign, with more experimental level design and objectives. Try to kill all the enemies with only a baseball bat, or survive an onslaught of police until the time runs out. Play the first couple of levels of the campaign to unlock challenges.


RED HOT VENGEANCE features a user-friendly map editor built into the game. Utilizing Steam Workshop, you can create levels and upload them for everyone to play. While the editor doesn't place any arbitrary restrictions on the user, there are guidelines to making a good, functional level. See the guides section of the community hub for a comprehensive guide on making levels.
game_info.description: You are a hitman seeking vengeance after being betrayed. Fight through waves of enemies across multiple levels, eliminating all hostile targets while following your code: no killing innocents (women and children). Use your weapons strategically, manage ammunition, and survive increasingly difficult encounters. Complete all levels to achieve your revenge.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Shoot your weapon
Z: Switch weapons (when multiple weapons unlocked)
Shift: Sprint (move faster, drains stamina)
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to main menu)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and shooting mechanics test. Validates that the player can move in all directions, shoot at enemies, and interact with the game environment properly. Tests collision detection and basic game loop functionality.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player character in a pattern that covers the playable area, shoot periodically to test weapon mechanics, and verify position updates are working correctly. Check that enemies spawn and respond to player actions.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves around the game area without getting stuck. Shooting mechanic triggers bullet creation. Position tracking works correctly. No crashes or freezing occurs during basic gameplay.

TEST_2.test_description: Complete win condition test. Implements an optimal strategy to complete the first level by eliminating all hostile enemies while avoiding innocents. Tests the full gameplay loop from start to victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate toward enemies strategically, maintain safe distance while shooting, avoid innocents at all costs. Prioritize closest threats, manage ammunition efficiently, and use movement to dodge enemy fire. Clear all enemies to trigger level completion.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All hostile enemies are eliminated without killing any innocents. Player survives and triggers the win condition. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Score and statistics are properly tracked throughout the test.

TEST_3.test_description: Weapon switching and ammunition management test. Validates that players can switch between unlocked weapons and that ammunition tracking works correctly for each weapon type.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Switch between available weapons using the Z key, fire each weapon to deplete ammunition, and verify that weapon stats (damage, fire rate, ammo) are tracked independently. Test reload mechanics if implemented.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Weapon switching works smoothly without errors. Each weapon maintains separate ammunition counts. Player can effectively use different weapons in combat situations. UI correctly displays current weapon and ammo status.

TEST_4.test_description: Sprint and stamina system test. Validates that the sprint mechanic works correctly, stamina depletes and regenerates appropriately, and movement speed changes are noticeable and functional.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Hold Shift to sprint continuously until stamina is depleted, release to allow regeneration, and repeat the cycle. Test sprinting while moving in different directions and while under enemy fire.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Stamina depletes while sprinting and regenerates when not sprinting. Movement speed increases noticeably during sprint. Stamina UI indicator updates correctly. Player cannot sprint when stamina is depleted.
TEST_4.description: Sprint and stamina system test. Validates that the sprint mechanic works correctly, stamina depletes and regenerates appropriately, and movement speed changes are noticeable and functional.

TEST_4.expected: Stamina depletes while sprinting and regenerates when not sprinting. Movement speed increases noticeably during sprint. Stamina UI indicator updates correctly. Player cannot sprint when stamina is depleted.

TEST_5.test_description: Innocent protection rule test. Validates that the game correctly enforces the "no killing innocents" rule by triggering game over when an innocent is killed, either by player or by mistake.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Intentionally shoot at innocent NPCs (women and children) to trigger the lose condition. Verify that the game properly detects innocent casualties and transitions to game over state with appropriate messaging.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game immediately transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE when an innocent is killed. Clear message explains the rule violation. Player cannot continue the level after breaking the rule. Game state properly resets on restart.
